description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure depicted in a dynamic walking pose, with one leg forward and the other back, suggesting motion. The figure is dressed in a fitted, knee-length dress and is wearing high-heeled shoes. The arms are relaxed and positioned naturally at the sides, with the hands open and fingers slightly apart. The body proportions and posture indicate an adult female, and the overall silhouette is slender and upright. The head is slightly tilted, and the hairstyle appears to be medium-length and straight, falling just above the shoulders. The surface of the figure is smooth and uniform, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A slender adult female pedestrian in a knee-length dress and high heels, captured mid-walk with a natural, upright posture and medium-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the forward leg, dress details, and relaxed arm positions.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlighting the stride and the side profile of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, both legs, and the heel details.
description_view_3: Rear-right angle emphasizing the back leg, heel, and the side of the dress.
